ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the document (e.g., Ready to use, Draft) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the document */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the document was last modified */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., pdf, docx) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the author belongs */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author within the organization (e.g., editor, reviewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document to which this version belongs */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made this version */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created or modified */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES document_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization (e.g., editor, reviewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document whose status changed */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status assigned to the document */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the status change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_history_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_tags_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document associated with the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_categories_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the document has been accessed */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date and time the document was last accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
